velocity_vs_rigour_quote: Strong software engineering fundamentals (CI/CD, testing, design patterns)
velocity_vs_rigour_reasoning: The JD emphasizes testing, CI/CD, best practices, and reliability (maintaining source system performance) with zero velocity language, establishing a rigour-focused orientation.
domain_risk_quote: most important company reports that inform executive decisions
domain_risk_reasoning: Finance tech sector with executive-level decision impact and business-critical data operations defaults to high risk.
data_team_maturity_quote: Build, maintain, and drive the transition to our new DataPlatform (Dagster, dbt, AWS ECS, and GCP BigQuery). This involves creating foundational tools and monitoring systems
data_team_maturity_reasoning: Existing operations being maintained while building new platform infrastructure and foundational tools indicates scaling rather than greenfield startup.
jd_authorship_quote: Oversee the company's largest data movement operations, handling terabyte-scale transfers from MySQL in AWS to BigQuery nightly while maintaining source system performance
jd_authorship_reasoning: Technically specific with named systems, scale metrics, and concrete daily responsibilities rather than generic boilerplate.
stakeholder_orientation_quote: creating foundational tools and monitoring systems for other data teams
stakeholder_orientation_reasoning: The role's primary purpose is to build and maintain data platform infrastructure for internal data team consumption, with platform work dominating two of three key responsibilities.
autonomy_level_quote: drive the transition to our new DataPlatform (Dagster, dbt, AWS ECS, and GCP BigQuery)
autonomy_level_reasoning: The role is expected to drive major platform initiatives, own critical systems, and oversee large operations—indicating significant strategic direction-setting rather than execution of externally-set priorities.
greenfield_vs_fix_quote: Build, maintain, and drive the transition to our new DataPlatform (Dagster, dbt, AWS ECS, and GCP BigQuery). This involves creating foundational tools and monitoring systems
ai_role_quote: Build, maintain, and drive the transition to our new DataPlatform (Dagster, dbt, AWS ECS, and GCP BigQuery). This involves creating foundational tools and monitoring systems
ai_role_reasoning: Standard data platform engineering without AI tool usage, AI infrastructure building, or AI-first mindset signals.
testing_framing_quote: Strong software engineering fundamentals (CI/CD, testing, design patterns)
testing_framing_reasoning: Testing mentioned as foundational skill requirement, but no explicit ownership verb or testing tool specification.
loss_aversion_framing_quote: Oversee the company's largest data movement operations, handling terabyte-scale transfers from MySQL in AWS to BigQuery nightly while maintaining source system performance
loss_aversion_framing_reasoning: Operational reliability and system performance emphasized; concern about breaking source systems during critical data operations, but no compliance or regulatory framing.
